name: 62M — Chest pain, dyspnea, diaphoresis (cardiac)
note: 62-year-old male with hypertension, diabetes and a 30 pack-year smoking history presents with acute substernal chest pain, shortness of breath and profuse sweating that began 1 hour ago at rest.

name: 48F — Pleuritic chest pain, leg swelling (PE concern)
note: 48-year-old female 2 weeks post hip surgery with active malignancy presents with sudden pleuritic chest pain, dyspnea and unilateral leg swelling.

name: 71M — Cough, fever, focal dyspnea (pneumonia)
note: 71-year-old male with COPD presents with productive cough, fever and chills for 3 days with new focal shortness of breath.

name: 66F — Facial droop, slurred speech (stroke code)
note: 66-year-old female with atrial fibrillation, sudden onset of right-sided facial droop, slurred speech and left arm weakness 40 minutes ago.

name: 55M — Heartburn, retrosternal burning (GERD vs cardiac)
note: 55-year-old male with obesity reports burning retrosternal chest discomfort after large meals, worse lying down, with acid regurgitation.
